title: The Unexpected Hug
content: Natalie had a difficult day at work and felt exhausted as she walked home. When she reached the apartment building, she found Liam waiting outside. Before she could say anything, he gave her a warm hug. Natalie immediately felt calmer. They sat on a nearby bench, talking until the stars appeared in the sky. Liam never asked many questions. He simply listened. Natalie realized that sometimes the best comfort did not come from words but from someone who truly cared.
